question_tagalog: Nung first time mo magmahal, ganito rin ba ka-intense ang feeling?
question_english: When you first loved, was the feeling this intense too?
quote_tagalog: Kahit ilang beses pa magmahal, ikaw ang pinaka totoo.
quote_english: No matter how many times I love, you are the truest.

question_tagalog: Sino ang kauna-unahang tao na nagpaiyak sayo nang sobra?
question_english: Who was the first person to make you cry so much?
quote_tagalog: Pupunasan ko ang mga luha mo ngayon at bukas.
quote_english: I'll wipe your tears today and tomorrow.

question_tagalog: Anong pangarap sa first love mo na natupad sakin?
question_english: What dream from your first love came true with me?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw ang panalangin na sinagot ng panahon.
quote_english: You are the prayer that time answered.

question_tagalog: Totoo bang never mong makakalimutan ang first love mo?
question_english: Is it true you'll never completely forget your first love?
quote_tagalog: Maaaring di makalimutan, pero ikaw ang paborito.
quote_english: Might not forget, but you are the favorite.

question_tagalog: Ano yung pagkakamali mo sa first love mo na hindi mo na inuulit sakin?
question_english: What mistake from your first love do you not repeat with me?
quote_tagalog: Nag-grow ako para mahalin ka nang tama.
quote_english: I grew to love you the right way.

question_tagalog: Kung maibabalik mo ang panahon, may babaguhin ka ba sa first heartbreak mo?
question_english: If you could go back in time, would you change anything about your first heartbreak?
quote_tagalog: Kung hindi dahil doon, hindi tayo magkikita.
quote_english: If not for that, we wouldn't have met.

question_tagalog: Masakit ba maalala ang una mong iniyakan nang dahil sa pag-ibig?
question_english: Does it hurt to remember the first person you cried over because of love?
quote_tagalog: Lahat ng sakit noon ay napalitan na ng saya ngayon.
quote_english: All the pain before is now replaced with joy.

question_tagalog: Ano yung definition mo ng love back then vs ngayon?
question_english: What was your definition of love back then vs now?
quote_tagalog: Akala ko laro lang noon, buong buhay na pala ngayon.
quote_english: I thought it was just a game before, it's my whole life now.

question_tagalog: Bakit feeling natin ang first love ang pinaka-pure na love?
question_english: Why do we feel first love is the purest love?
quote_tagalog: Dahil doon tayo unang natutong magbigay nang walang hinihintay.
quote_english: Because that's where we first learned to give without expecting.

question_tagalog: May kanta ba na nagpapaalala sayo ng first love mo dati?
question_english: Is there a song that reminds you of your first love before?
quote_tagalog: Ngayon, ikaw na ang paborito kong kanta.
quote_english: Now, you are my favorite song.

question_tagalog: Tuwing kailan mo naiisip paminsan-minsan ang first love mo?
question_english: When do you occasionally think of your first love?
quote_tagalog: Naiisip ko lang sya as a lesson, pero ikaw as a blessing.
quote_english: I just think of them as a lesson, but you as a blessing.

question_tagalog: Kung may chance ka mag-thank you sa first love mo, sasabihin mo ba?
question_english: If you had a chance to say thank you to your first love, would you?
quote_tagalog: Salamat sakanya, kasi nahanap kita.
quote_english: Thank them, because I found you.

question_tagalog: Natakot ka bang magmahal ulit pagkatapos ng first heartbreak mo?
question_english: Were you afraid to love again after your first heartbreak?
quote_tagalog: Sayang ang pag-ibig kung hindi isusugal sayo.
quote_english: Love is wasted if not gambled on you.

question_tagalog: Ano yung promise mo noon na binigay mo rin sakin ngayon?
question_english: What did you promise before that you also gave to me now?
quote_tagalog: Pero sakin, tinutupad na natin.
quote_english: But with me, we are fulfilling it.

question_tagalog: Sa tingin mo ba ang 'true love' nakikita lang once sa isang buhay?
question_english: Do you think 'true love' is only found once in a lifetime?
quote_tagalog: Ang true love ay kung sino yung pipiliin mong mag-stay.
quote_english: True love is whoever you choose to stay.

question_tagalog: Naniniwala ka ba pareho tayo magiging the 'last love'?
question_english: Do you believe we will both be the 'last love'?
quote_tagalog: Wala nakong gustong makasama kundi ikaw.
quote_english: I don't want to be with anyone else but you.

question_tagalog: Nung tayo palang yung nasa courting stage, inisip mo bang ako yung 'the one'?
question_english: When we were in the courting stage, did you think I was 'the one'?
quote_tagalog: Sayo ko lang naramdaman na sigurado nako.
quote_english: Only with you did I feel certain.

question_tagalog: Ano ang unang unang gift na nabigay sayo in your life from a lover?
question_english: What was the very first gift you received in your life from a lover?
quote_tagalog: Ako nalang ang magbibigay ng lahat from now on.
quote_english: I'll be the one providing everything from now on.

question_tagalog: Bakit the 'first love' almost always ends up breaking?
question_english: Why does the 'first love' almost always end up breaking?
quote_tagalog: Para magka-puwang sa the last at tama na darating.
quote_english: To make space for the last and right one to arrive.

question_tagalog: Anong klaseng inosenteng feeling meron ka noong una kang nainlove?
question_english: What kind of innocent feeling did you have when you first fell in love?
quote_tagalog: Kahit alam ko na ang mundo, sayo ako nagpapakabata.
quote_english: Even if I know the world, I act like a kid with you.

question_tagalog: Kailan mo na-realize na yung puppy love mo noon ay hindi pala seryoso?
question_english: When did you realize that your puppy love before was not serious?
quote_tagalog: Ngayong kasama kita, alam ko na ang totoong seryoso.
quote_english: Now that I'm with you, I know what serious really is.

question_tagalog: May part ba sakin na kamukha o ka-ugali ng first impression of your ideal type noon?
question_english: Is there a part of me that looks or acts like your first impression of your ideal type before?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw ang sinira lahat ng standards ko.
quote_english: You destroyed all my standards.

question_tagalog: Pag napanuod mo ang old romantic movies, naiisip mo rin ba minsan first true feelings mo?
question_english: When you watch old romantic movies, do you sometimes think of your first true feelings?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw lang nai-imagine ko sa mga romantic scenes.
quote_english: I only imagine you in romantic scenes.

question_tagalog: Kung magiging subject sa school ang 'First Love', ano yung title ng lesson number 1?
question_english: If 'First Love' was a school subject, what would be the title of lesson number 1?
quote_tagalog: Lesson: Let it go, so the true love can grow.
quote_english: Lesson: Let it go, so true love can grow.

question_tagalog: Ilang taon ka inabot bago ka naka-move on sa unang nagpatibok ng puso mo?
question_english: How many years did it take before you moved on from the first to make your heart beat?
quote_tagalog: Matagal ako nag-heal, pero ikaw yung panggamot.
quote_english: I healed slowly, but you were the cure.

question_tagalog: May naiwan ka bang feeling of 'what if' sa first love mo?
question_english: Did you leave any feeling of 'what if' on your first love?
quote_tagalog: Wala nang 'what if', puro 'what is' nalang dahil sayo.
quote_english: No more 'what if', just 'what is' because of you.

question_tagalog: Nakaramdam ka ba ng relief nung naka-move on ka na originally?
question_english: Did you feel relief when you moved on originally?
quote_tagalog: Sobrang saya ko nung nakita ko yung worth ko at nahanap kita.
quote_english: I was so happy when I saw my worth and found you.

question_tagalog: Na-experience mo ba yung you thought the world ended dahil sa past heartbreak?
question_english: Have you experienced thinking the world ended because of past heartbreak?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw ang naging bagong simula ng lahat sakin.
quote_english: You became the new beginning of everything to me.

question_tagalog: Gaano ka naging toxic nung first time mo sa relationship na the past?
question_english: How toxic did you become during your first time in a relationship in the past?
quote_tagalog: Tinama natin lahat for our present.
quote_english: We corrected everything for our present.

question_tagalog: Paano mo nakilala for the absolute first time true love ng buhay mo?
question_english: How did you absolutely meet the true love of your life for the first time?
quote_tagalog: Hindi ko in-expect na ikaw na pala yon.
quote_english: I didn't expect it was already you.

question_tagalog: Is there something na hinding hindi mo ipaparanas sakin from your previous relationships?
question_english: Is there something you will absolutely never make me experience from your previous relationships?
quote_tagalog: Wala nang sakit, puro kilig at peace nalang satin.
quote_english: No more pain, just butterflies and peace for us.

question_tagalog: Nahiya ka bang ipakilalang brokenhearted ka sa everyone that time?
question_english: Were you embarrassed to introduce you were brokenhearted to everyone that time?
quote_tagalog: Pero hindi ako nahihiyang ipagsigawan ka sa lahat.
quote_english: But I am not shy to shout about you to everyone.

question_tagalog: Akala mo ba yung the first love takes an important piece of your heart completely?
question_english: Did you think the first love takes an important piece of your heart completely?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw yung bubuo sa mga kulang pa sa puso ko.
quote_english: You'll complete the missing pieces in my heart.

question_tagalog: Totoo the ba pag the absolutely first love the purest intentions of all entirely?
question_english: Is it true that first love holds the absolute purest intentions entirely?
quote_tagalog: Wala nang pure sakin kundi our fully absolute true love.
quote_english: Nothing is purer to me than our absolute true love.

question_tagalog: Kung magkasalubong kayo the again the right fully on random, anong mafi-feel mo?
question_english: If you passed each other absolutely by random, what would you feel?
quote_tagalog: Wala nako mararamdaman dahil the the fully sayo na ako.
quote_english: I won't feel anything anymore cause I am entirely yours.

question_tagalog: Anong life lesson ang the directly iniwan sayo entirely nung una the perfectly love mo?
question_english: What absolute life lesson was entirely left by your perfect first love?
quote_tagalog: Itinuro nya sakin ang fully absolute magpahalaga in perfectly you.
quote_english: It definitely taught me the full absolute value of you.

question_tagalog: Bakit naging mahirap the the forget quickly about deeply specifically sa taong we primarily loved purely?
question_english: Why was it completely difficult to exactly specifically pure forget the person we primarily loved?
quote_tagalog: Memories exactly make safely explicit thoroughly us complete purely who we simply true specifically are securely.
quote_english: Memories completely pure effectively absolutely simply purely make exclusively valid exactly us clearly surely.
